task:
Open /home/user/Documents/dark_photo.png in GIMP — a 400x300 image where every pixel is approximately RGB (30,30,30).

Increase the brightness by +80 (so each pixel becomes approximately RGB (110,110,110)) and export the brightened image as PNG to /home/user/Documents/bright_photo.png.

verification.description: Output file is in PNG format
Center pixel is brightened from ~30 to ~110 (brightness +80)
